full_description: use the left arm to grasp the kettle, move the spout above the mug, and tilt the kettle into a pouring pose
schema: {A} notifies the kettle, {B} notifies the mug, {a} notifies the arm used to grasp and pour
preference: num of words should not exceed 14. Degree of detail avg is six.
seen: Move {A} above {B} and tilt it using {a}.
Pick up {A} with {a}, then pour into {B}.
Use {a} to bring {A} above {B} and pour.
Raise {A}, align it over {B}, and pour with {a}.
Use {a} to grasp {A} and pour over {B}.
Hold {A} with {a}, place its spout over {B}, and pour.
unseen: Lift {A} with {a} and tilt it over {B}.
